title: calcitrapa solstitialis subsp. adami
intro: Calcitrapa solstitialis subsp. adami, also known as the Adam's summer caltrop, is a subspecies of the calcitrapa solstitialis plant that belongs to the Capparaceae family. The Adam's summer caltrop has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Calcitrapa solstitialis subsp. adami can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments.
